org.apache.dubbo.config.context

类 ConfigManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.common.context.LifecycleAdapter
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.context.ConfigManager
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    FrameworkExt, Lifecycle

    public class ConfigManager
extends LifecycleAdapter
implements FrameworkExt

      • destroy

        public void destroy()
             throws IllegalStateException
        从接口复制的说明: Lifecycle
        Destroy the component
        指定者:
        destroy 在接口中 Lifecycle
        覆盖:
        destroy 在类中 LifecycleAdapter
        抛出:
        IllegalStateException
        从以下版本开始:
        2.7.8

      • addConfig
